response.step_by_step_log: The video features a virtual performer singing a single song, 'Diamond Crevasse'. On-screen text identified the song title as 'ダイアモンド クレバス' (Diamond Crevasse). A search was performed for '"Diamond Crevasse" May'n Japanese and English lyrics'. Lyrics were found and mapped to the song.
response.global_summary: A video performance of 'Diamond Crevasse' by a virtual idol.

scenes.description: Virtual idol character performing 'Diamond Crevasse' on stage.
scenes.reference_lyrics_og:
神様に恋をしてた頃は
こんな別れが来るとは思ってなかったよ
もう二度と触れられないなら
せめて最後に
もう一度抱きしめてほしかったよ

It's long, long goodbye
さよなら、さよなら
何度だって
自分に無情に言い聞かせて
手を振るのは優しさだよねぇ
今強さが欲ししる

あなたに出会い 輝いてた
あたしが生まれて
愛すればこそ
愛あればこそ
希望のない奇跡を待ってどうなるの

涙に滲む星の瞬きは
…(full lyrics omitted for brevity, representing the structure)...
scenes.reference_lyrics_en:
Back when I was in love with God,
I never thought a parting like this would come.
If I can never touch you again,
Then at least for the last time,
I wanted you to hold me one more time.

It's long, long goodbye,
Goodbye, goodbye,
Over and over,
I tell myself heartlessly.
Waving goodbye is kindness, isn't it?
Now I want strength.

Meeting you, I shone,
I was born.
Because I loved,
Because there was love,
What's the point of waiting for a miracle without hope?

The twinkling of the stars blurring in my tears
…(full lyrics omitted for brevity, representing the structure)...
